summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Settings page with 3 tabs (Verbal Dropdowns, Branches, Pricing). All backend API endpoints pass (10/10 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with all tabs, dialogs, and interactions working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/settings/dropdowns - Returns dropdown settings with identification, color, origin, comment fields
PUT /api/settings/dropdowns/{field} - Updates dropdown options with stone type filters
POST /api/branches - Creates new branch with all required fields
GET /api/pricing - Returns pricing brackets and color stability fee
Settings page loads with 3 tabs (Verbal Dropdowns, Branches, Pricing)
Tab switching between all 3 tabs works correctly
Verbal Dropdowns tab - displays identification options with stone type filters
Verbal Dropdowns tab - Add Option dialog opens with value input and stone type badges
Branches tab - displays existing branches (Israel, USA)
Branches tab - Add Branch dialog shows all required fields (Name, Code, Address, Return Address, Phone, Email)
Branches tab - Edit branch button visible for each row
Pricing tab - displays Color Stability Fee ($50)
Pricing tab - displays Value Brackets table with Min/Max Value, Express/Normal/Recheck fees
Pricing tab - Edit Pricing button enters edit mode with editable inputs
Pricing tab - Add Bracket button visible in edit mode
seed_data_creation: Test branches TEST_Branch_Settings and TEST_Branch_Updated were created during API testing. They can remain or be manually cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings page is fully functional. All 3 tabs work: Verbal Dropdowns (CRUD with stone type filters), Branches (CRUD), Pricing (edit mode with brackets). Test credentials: admin@bashari.com / admin123
